title: The Declaration Reaches the World
description: Robin’s fear of living is tied to the pain of Ohara, setting up the truth behind her isolation.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this part follows Nico Robin, Luffy, Spandam, Zoro, Nami. Robin’s fear of living is tied to the pain of Ohara, setting up the truth behind her isolation.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: I'm sorry for coming back so late.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: When you're done with your dinner,
